title: Data table view
summary: Searchable, paginated data table with row actions menu, status badges, and empty state.
brief: Build a list screen for a resource (users, invoices, etc.) with a search input, a paginated data table, a per-row dropdown of actions, and status badges in one of the columns.

checklist.check: Search input is debounced (200–300ms) before hitting server or filtering.
Destructive row actions (delete) route through AlertDialog, not a bare click.
Empty result set renders a helpful empty state, not a blank table.
[Data Table] Avoid: Forgetting getCoreRowModel() (table renders nothing)
[Data Table] Avoid: Recreating columns array on every render (breaks memoization — wrap in useMemo or define outside the component)
[Data Table] Avoid: Using accessorKey with nested paths without accessorFn
[Data Table] Avoid: Not adding filter/sort row models when those features are needed
[Data Table] A11y: Uses semantic <table> via Hex UI Table primitives. Add aria-sort to sortable column headers. Announce filter/sort changes via aria-live for dynamic updates.
[Input] Avoid: Missing associated Label element for accessibility
[Input] Avoid: Using type='number' without min/max constraints
[Input] Avoid: Not providing placeholder text for context
[Input] A11y: Always pair with a Label using htmlFor/id. Consider aria-describedby for helper text or error messages.
[Dropdown Menu] Avoid: Using DropdownMenu as a form Select (use Select instead)
[Dropdown Menu] Avoid: Putting interactive elements directly in the trigger without asChild
[Dropdown Menu] Avoid: Too many items without grouping (use DropdownMenuLabel + DropdownMenuSeparator)
[Dropdown Menu] Avoid: Forgetting DropdownMenuShortcut for keyboard-accessible actions
[Dropdown Menu] A11y: Full keyboard navigation: arrow keys, Home, End, typeahead, Escape. Radix handles role='menu', role='menuitem', and aria-labelledby.
[Badge] Avoid: Using destructive variant for non-error states
[Badge] Avoid: Badge text too long
[Badge] A11y: Purely decorative by default. Add role='status' for dynamic status badges.
[Pagination] Avoid: Using PaginationLink without href (anchor is not keyboard-reachable)
[Pagination] Avoid: Forgetting isActive on the current page (no visual or aria-current feedback)
[Pagination] Avoid: Showing every page number on long ranges — use PaginationEllipsis to truncate
[Pagination] Avoid: Using onClick-only <button> instead of PaginationLink — loses right-click-open-new-tab affordance; prefer href + Next.js Link when client-side routing is needed

[Pagination] A11y: Root is role='navigation' aria-label='pagination'. Active link gets aria-current='page'. Previous/Next have aria-label. Ellipsis is decorative (aria-hidden) with a sr-only 'More pages' label.
[Button] Avoid: Using 'destructive' variant for non-destructive actions
[Button] Avoid: Nesting interactive elements inside asChild button
[Button] Avoid: Missing aria-label when using icon-only size='icon' variant
[Button] Avoid: Using onClick for navigation instead of asChild with a link
[Button] A11y: Automatically handles focus ring, disabled state, and aria attributes. Icon-only buttons MUST have aria-label. Loading state automatically sets disabled.
